'''Ark Poinard''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] officer in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Starfleet]]. By [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]], he held the rank of [[Vice Admiral/Legends|Vice Admiral]]. His brother was once an [[All Terrain Armored Transport/Legends|AT-AT]] commander. Poinard always revered [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] and would always utter "[[May the Force be with you/Legends|may the Force be with you]]" during battle, if only to himself. By [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]] he commanded the [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] ''[[Erinnic]]'' and its support group. That [[Standard year/Legends|year]] he was assigned to the [[Battle of Ord Mantell (Yuuzhan Vong War)|Battle of Ord Mantell]]. Although command of his fleet was given over to [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[General/Legends|general]] [[Yald Sutel]], he retained titular captaincy of his ship. Poinard assisted Sutel in the failed defense of [[Ord Mantell/Legends|Ord Mantell]].
